Coloring sheet — black & white, 2 pages. Print 8.5×11, portrait, double-sided (flip on long edge). Grayscale-friendly, no color fills. Page 1 = color page, Page 2 = official rules. This banner won’t print.

Coloring Contest

Color it your way, then enter to win!

Ask a grown-up to post to social media  •  Tag @frenchroofing  •  #FrenchRoofingColorContest
French Roofing Coloring Contest

Official Contest Rules

How to Enter

  1. Color the official French Roofing coloring sheet on the front.
  2. Take a clear photo of the finished sheet.
  3. Ask a grown-up to post to social media — public on Facebook and/or Instagram.
  4. Tag @frenchroofing and use #FrenchRoofingColorContest.
No social media? Email a photo to team@frenchroofing.com to enter the two judged categories (Most Creative & Most Realistic). People’s Choice requires a public post.

3 Grand Prizes

  • Most Creative — chosen by our kid judge Peyton (11).
  • Most Realistic — chosen by our kid judge Sawyer (6).
  • People’s Choice — the entry with the most likes on Facebook and Instagram combined.
★ Plus — every entry wins a prize! ★

Deadlines & Eligibility

  • Open to all ages. One entry per person.
  • Entries accepted Saturday, June 27 through midnight Monday, June 29. Winners announced Tuesday, June 30 on our social pages.
  • Entrants under 18 must have a parent or guardian post and enter on their behalf.
  • French Roofing employees and their immediate families may enter for fun but are not eligible for prizes.

The Fine Print

  • By entering, you allow French Roofing to repost and use the submitted artwork on its social channels and in marketing.
  • French Roofing may disqualify incomplete or inappropriate entries.
  • This contest is not sponsored, endorsed, or administered by Facebook or Instagram.
Questions? team@frenchroofing.com
